ULF-Synth
  • ULF-Synth

ULF-Synth

Physics-guided ultra-low-field MRI simulation and enhancement.

ULF-Synth simulates realistic ultra-low-field (0.064 T) MRI from conventional high-field (1.5 T) volumes, and provides pretrained models for enhancing real ULF acquisitions. The pipeline models signal loss, T2* decay, thermal noise, k-space cropping, undersampling, and B0 off-resonance — all without requiring paired ULF-HF training data.
